comments.text: The work was entrusted to BRO on 6 May 2002. The foundation stone of the project was laid on 28 June 2010 by Sonia Gandhi in her capacity as the Chairperson of National Advisory Council. As of June 2012, two years after the start of the project, 3.5 km of the tunnel digging had been completed.

comments.author: @Sonukvk
comments.text: Its a great construction, but why our tunnels doesnt have the  finishing of chinese or european tunnels. They normally put tiles in sides and make it more attractive. China now constructing two tunnels in  chittagong bangladesh and kathmandu nepal, both those tunnels looks impressive. We are far behind in the case of aesthetic, very few companies do works with good finishing. Dubai metro constructed 10 years ago its stations and pillars looks modern than any recently constructed indian metros. I think indian companies doesnt concentrate on aesthetics, their only aim is to finish the work and grab the money
